summary: Backend-only re-test of Roofing CRM. Re-ran existing pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering all features in the review request. Result: 20/20 PASS in 5.70s. Auth (login success/invalid/register/duplicate/me protected+unprotected), /api/options counts (7/5/8/4), Contacts CRUD with billing_same_as_address true (auto-copy address) and false (preserve), Properties CRUD with property_contact_id linking, Deals CRUD with all P&L fields, and /api/dashboard/summary aggregations (open_leads, won_deals, pipeline_revenue, won_revenue, total_costs) all behave correctly with delta verification against snapshot. 401 enforced on all protected endpoints.

minor.issue: No brute-force lockout / rate limiting (acceptable per PRD; not requested).
JWT returned in body only; httpOnly cookie not set on login (PRD explicitly says Bearer header is the contract, so not a defect).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 452-line file - fine for current scope; split into routers if it exceeds ~700 lines.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' combined with allow_credentials=True is rejected by browsers per spec. Production deploys must set explicit CORS_ORIGINS in backend/.env.
Dashboard profit_ytd compares ISO timestamp strings to year_start string. Works due to ISO-8601 lexicographic ordering but a typed datetime comparison is more robust.
No refresh-token flow; 24h access tokens are acceptable for MVP.
All endpoints correctly exclude Mongo _id (projection or strip_id helper). No ObjectId leakage.
seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-seeded on backend startup. Tests create and clean up TEST_-prefixed contacts/properties/deals within the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is stable, no regressions vs iteration_1. All 12 review-request bullets verified. Re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml from /app. JWT via Authorization: Bearer header; cookie path exists in get_current_user but login doesn't set one. /api/options is auth-protected. Dashboard total_costs aggregates only Won deals' four cost fields; pipeline_revenue sums non-Won/Lost deals' chosen_amount.
